name: 3dtsi-labor-intelligence-platform
description: 3DTSI Labor Intelligence Platform - continuously learning labor intelligence database for low-voltage construction operations

scripts.db:migrate:local: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply lip-db --local --config worker/wrangler.toml
scripts.db:migrate:remote: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply lip-db --remote --config worker/wrangler.toml
